name: Bleu Cheese Spread with Figs
recipeIngredient: California dried figs - sliced into rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or mixing bowl, blend the crumbled Bleu cheese and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Add the dry white wine, Worcestershire sauce, paprika, garlic powder, and hot pepper sauce to the blended cheeses. Continue blending until all ingredients are well combined.
3. If making ahead of time, refrigerate the mixture until ready to serve. When ready to serve, bring the spread to room temperature.
4. Sprinkle with additional paprika and garnish with parsley.
5. Serve with fig slices and crackers.
